description: Complete registry of AI capabilities in Gluecron and how each improves via the flywheel

capabilities.name: Semantic Code Search
capabilities.description: Search your codebase by meaning and intent, not just keyword matching
capabilities.how_it_works: Embeds code chunks into vector space using Claude's understanding of code semantics. Queries are also embedded and matched by semantic similarity.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Which results users clicked, whether they found what they needed, subsequent search refinements
capabilities.flywheel_output: Improved embedding weighting for your codebase's specific domain language and patterns
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub search is keyword + regex. Gluecron search understands that 'where do we validate payments' and 'payment validation logic' are the same question.

capabilities.name: AI PR Reviewer
capabilities.description: Reviews PRs like a senior engineer on your team, not a generic linter
capabilities.how_it_works: Reads the full PR diff, surrounding context, and your repo's historical patterns. Posts specific, actionable comments. Learns which comment styles your team accepts.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Which review comments were accepted, dismissed, or argued against. What the final merged code looked like.
capabilities.flywheel_output: Review style adapts to your team's standards. Comments get more precise and less noisy over time.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub Copilot code review is generic. Gluecron's reviewer learns your team's specific standards and enforces them consistently.

capabilities.name: Predictive CI
capabilities.description: Runs only the tests that matter for the files you changed
capabilities.how_it_works: Analyses changed files, maps them to test coverage data and historical failure correlations. Selects the minimal test set most likely to catch regressions.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Whether the selected tests caught the failures, whether missed tests would have caught additional failures
capabilities.flywheel_output: Improved file-to-test mapping accuracy. Faster CI with higher confidence.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub Actions runs everything every time. Gluecron predicts which tests matter and cuts CI time by up to 60% without missing failures.

capabilities.name: Smart Merge
capabilities.description: Resolves merge conflicts by understanding semantic intent, not just line differences
capabilities.how_it_works: When a conflict occurs, reads both branches' changes in context, understands the intent of each, and proposes a resolution that satisfies both.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Whether the proposed resolution was accepted, modified, or rejected. What the final resolution looked like.
capabilities.flywheel_output: Improved conflict resolution accuracy for your codebase's common patterns.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub shows you the conflict. Gluecron resolves it.

capabilities.name: Auto Documentation
capabilities.description: Generates and keeps documentation in sync with code changes
capabilities.how_it_works: On every PR merge, scans changed files, updates or generates corresponding documentation, opens a follow-up PR with doc updates.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Whether generated docs were accepted as-is, edited, or rejected. What the final docs looked like.
capabilities.flywheel_output: Documentation style matches your team's voice and technical depth preferences.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub has no documentation automation. Gluecron ensures docs never go stale.

capabilities.name: Security Intelligence
capabilities.description: Explains vulnerabilities in plain language with prioritized, context-aware fix suggestions
capabilities.how_it_works: Scans dependencies and code on every push. For each finding, generates an explanation of the risk in your specific context and a concrete fix suggestion.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Which findings developers fixed first, which they deferred, whether AI-suggested fixes were applied
capabilities.flywheel_output: Improved prioritization: surfaces the vulnerabilities your team is most likely to act on, in the order most impactful for your risk profile.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub Dependabot lists CVEs. Gluecron explains what they mean for your code and tells you exactly what to change.

capabilities.name: Codebase Q&A
capabilities.description: Ask questions about the repo in natural language, get accurate answers
capabilities.how_it_works: Maintains a live semantic index of the codebase. Answers questions by retrieving relevant code chunks and synthesizing an accurate response.
capabilities.flywheel_input: Whether the answer was rated helpful, follow-up questions asked, source code references clicked
capabilities.flywheel_output: More accurate retrieval and better answer synthesis for your specific codebase structure.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub has no Q&A. Gluecron is the institutional knowledge layer for your codebase.

capabilities.name: Release Note Generator
capabilities.description: Writes release notes that match your team's style and voice
capabilities.how_it_works: Reads merged PRs and commits since last release, synthesizes a release note in your team's established style. Learns from edits to previous generated notes.
capabilities.flywheel_input: How much the generated notes were edited before publishing
capabilities.flywheel_output: Style drift toward zero edits needed over time.
capabilities.competitive_advantage_vs_github: GitHub has no release note AI. Teams spend hours on this manually.
